content:
MODULE: cosmos.integration.x_automation.reply_bot
FILE: cosmos/integration/x_automation/reply_bot.py (424 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: COSMOS REPLY BOT
====================

Monitors mentions and replies using swarm intelligence.

When someone mentions @CosmosAI:
1. Detect the mention
2. Consult the chat swarm about the topic
3. Reply with swarm consensus
4. Optionally post swarm deliberation publicly

SPECIAL: Grok Conversation Ha

CLASSES:
- ReplyBot: Monitors and replies to X mentions using swarm intelligence.

The bot:
1. Checks
  Methods: async def get_mentions(self) -> List[Dict]
  Methods: async def consult_swarm(self, topic: str, context: str=None) -> str
  Methods: def is_grok_reply(self, mention: Dict) -> bool
  Methods: async def handle_grok_conversation(self, mention: Dict) -> bool
  Methods: async def reply_to_mention(self, mention: Dict) -> bool
  Methods: async def process_mentions(self) -> int
  Methods: async def run_loop(self)

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_reply_bot() -> ReplyBot
- async def start_reply_bot()
